user_feedback: the game stops playing once wave 3 starts, I want you to now restructure this level system so that there are 3 maps. there is an easy map, a medium map, and then a hard map. and then in each of those maps, there are 5 waves, and I want to initiate each wave, can you make those changes? the maps should be different in path and aesthetic, execute!
analysis:
- Issue identified: Game needs restructuring to support 3 different maps (easy/medium/hard), each with 5 waves and manual wave initiation. Current system has 10 waves total with auto-start, and no map selection system.
- Files affected: globals.js, pathGeneration.js, waveManager.js, rendering.js, input.js, game.js
- Changes needed: 
  1. Add map system with 3 difficulty levels
  2. Create 3 distinct paths with different aesthetics
  3. Change wave system from 10 total to 5 per map
  4. Replace auto-wave-start with manual wave initiation via button/key
  5. Add map selection screen and wave start UI
  6. Update rendering to show different aesthetics per map
